Description: Project bootstrap: src/ layout, pyproject.toml, .gitignore, MIT license, requirements.txt
Add JsonStore: thread-safe JSON persistence with atomic write (tempfile + rename), update() callback, corruption recovery
Add AgentRegistry: lazy factory-based registration so agents can be enabled/disabled via settings
Build core MCP server using FastMCP; expose server_info, ping, server://agents resource, getting_started prompt
TaskAgent: add/list/complete/update/delete/stats with priority + due-date validation and overdue detection
NotesAgent: create/list/search/get/update/delete + tag normalisation + tag-frequency aggregation
WeatherAgent: deterministic mock forecast keyed on (city, date); current/forecast/compare/history tools; outfit prompt
FinanceAgent: expenses, monthly budgets, per-category summary with pct_used / remaining
FileAgent: directory scan/summary/search with extension→category mapping; read-only by design
KnowledgeBaseAgent: Q&A entries with word-overlap retrieval scoring; kb_answer_prompt template
Add 57 pytest cases: server wiring, registry, storage, and per-agent happy + edge cases
Bug: temp_f computed from unrounded base_c caused 0.1°F drift when round-tripping C↔F. Now derives from rounded temp_c.
Add examples/client_demo.py: stdio MCP client demonstrating tool discovery + a few sample calls
Initialise CHANGELOG.md and CHANGELOG.csv (importable to Google Sheets)
